title: Gluss'elta Sea
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Gluss'elta Sea''' was a freshwater [[Ocean/Legends|sea]] on [[Kintan/Legends|Kintan]]. It contained [[Glussa Island]] and the [[Gluss'elta Archipelago]]. The sea was home to deep-sea predators.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
*<!-- 2015-02-05 -->''[[Lords of Nal Hutta]]''
